title: Split PR CI into correctness and ARS workflows
ticket: Restructure pull request CI so correctness runs in a normal test workflow and Alignment/Reviewability/Safety run in a separate ARS gate. Keep the change focused on workflow, documentation, and ARS runner logic.

acceptance_criteria.text: Correctness runs in its own pull request workflow using the returns test suite.
Alignment, Reviewability, and Safety run in a separate pull request workflow using PR metadata and the diff.
Repository documentation explains the two-workflow split and the PR metadata convention.
